content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.context_profiles
FILE: cosmos/core/context_profiles.py (307 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Context Profiles - Multi-Context Management

"Be many people at once! Like a quantum superposition of personalities!"

Features:
- Multiple context profiles (Work, Personal, Project-specific)
- Profile-specific memory pools
- Quick context switching
- Profile-based preferences
- Automatic pro

CLASSES:
- ContextProfile: A context profile with its own settings and memory scope.
  Methods: def update_usage(self)
- ContextProfileManager: Manage multiple context profiles.
  Methods: def create_profile(self, name: str, description: str='', **kwargs) -> ContextProfile
  Methods: def switch_profile(self, profile_id: str) -> Optional[ContextProfile]
  Methods: def get_active_profile(self) -> Optional[ContextProfile]
  Methods: def auto_detect_profile(self, text: str) -> Optional[ContextProfile]
  Methods: def update_profile(self, profile_id: str, **kwargs) -> Optional[ContextProfile]
  Methods: def delete_profile(self, profile_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def list_profiles(self) -> list[ContextProfile]
  Methods: def get_profile_settings(self) -> dict
